expectations.text: The response mentions /branch as the in-session way to fork
expectations.evidence: Only mentions --continue --fork-session from the CLI. Does not mention /branch or /fork slash commands.

expectations.text: The response mentions claude --resume <session-id> --fork-session as the CLI way
The response explains that forking creates a copy of the conversation that diverges from that point
expectations.evidence: 'creates a new session that starts with a copy of your full conversation history up to that point, while leaving the original session untouched'
